'''301-MAX Nightlight''' was a sophisticated model of [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] produced by [[Kalibac Industries]]. They had a market value of 8,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="LOTE" />

A small, spherical [[Droid/Legends|droid]] equipped with a combat-enhanced [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] generator, the Nightlight was designed to patrol a specific area and seek out intruders or breaches of security. A number of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] packages were added to its systems, and an [[ionization buffer]] helped protect the 301-MAX from any [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion blasters]]. This ionization buffer was a major breakthrough for droid manufacturers, since it helped eliminate the need for additional plating.<ref name="LOTE" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' {{1st}}
